args.code: (()=>{try{var btns=document.querySelectorAll('button');var target=null;for(var i=0;i<btns.length;i++){if(btns[i].innerText.indexOf('不去了在家干活')>=0||btns[i].innerText.indexOf('明天去赶集')>=0){target=btns[i];break;}}if(target){target.click();return{clicked:true,text:target.innerText,btnCount:btns.length};}return{clicked:false,btnCount:btns.length,btnTexts:Array.from(btns).slice(0,10).map(function(b){return b.innerText;})};}catch(e){return{error:e.message};}})()
